lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and areas of rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stains. The engine and transmission require major mechanical repairs to be reliable.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and damaged. It requires major mechanical repairs to be fully operational.

Step into excellence with this stunning vehicle that is in absolute mint condition! It has been preserved in showroom quality, looking and driving as if it were brand new. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, making this an exceptional find for a discerning buyer.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The engine runs reliably and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears, with no major mechanical issues to report. There are minor cosmetic signs of wear consistent with regular use, but the interior and exterior remain clean and well-preserved. It is a solid, dependable car ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows extensive wear, including noticeable rust on the rocker panels, several large dents, and a heavily faded paint finish. Inside, the upholstery is torn in multiple places, and the electronics are largely non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and there is a persistent transmission fluid leak. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a project car or a source for parts.
Mint condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, this unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a refined exterior presence. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the sophisticated buyer prioritizing dependable engineering and enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and it’s still got so much life left in it! It’s been well-loved and runs like a champ, making it the perfect companion for your next adventure. It's clean, comfy, and ready to hit the road today. Come check it out—you won’t be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission, this unit features a variable M differential lock and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural rigidity. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment. While it exhibits minor cosmetic wear consistent with spirited use, the mechanical vitals are robust, providing the precise throttle response and telepathic steering feedback enthusiasts demand from this iconic chassis.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and style, presenting in well-maintained condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful use, while the interior remains a comfortable sanctuary with clean upholstery, a smoke-free cabin, and all tech features functioning as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly thanks to a consistent maintenance schedule, including a recent service and fluid flush. It drives straight and true, offering a confident experience on the road. This is a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking a quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with respect and is ready for the miles ahead.

Up for sale is a meticulously cared-for vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though a few minor stone chips on the front fascia reflect its honest road history. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with supple leather seating that shows only minimal signs of wear on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in great shape; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts smoothly, and I have kept a detailed log of all scheduled maintenance and recent fluid changes. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm and responsive. This is a solid, dependable vehicle that looks fantastic in any driveway and is ready for its next owner to drive home today.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six powerplant, delivering linear torque through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, the drivetrain utilizes a factory variable M-differential for optimal power delivery. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The suspension is dialed in with upgraded bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the car's celebrated handling dynamics. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain exceptionally sharp for the purist seeking an analog experience.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. All systems functional.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the ideal balance between modern performance and everyday practicality. The exterior presents beautifully, retaining a deep, lustrous finish that highlights the car's sharp lines, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium leather seating remains supportive and supple, and all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented history of on-time servicing. It delivers a smooth, responsive driving experience with a tight suspension, crisp gear shifts, and plenty of power on tap. Recently fitted with a fresh set of tires and a new battery, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without the premium of a showroom-new price point, this offering represents a superior investment in automotive excellence.
